deploy.startCommand: node backend/server.js & SERVER_PID=$!; cd backend && i=0; until npx prisma migrate deploy; do i=$((i+1)); if [ "$i" -ge 30 ]; then echo "Migration failed after retries"; kill $SERVER_PID; exit 1; fi; echo "Retrying migration in 5s..."; sleep 5; done; echo "Migrations complete"; wait $SERVER_PID
